name: Tabletop Exercise Automation
description: Automates tabletop exercise orchestration for incident response preparedness. A code node selects an exercise scenario from the scenario library based on the requested category (ransomware, phishing, insider threat, etc.). Riggs AI generates a tailored scenario brief with inject points and expected discussion topics. The scenario is distributed to participants via Slack and email. A delay allows time for the exercise to run, after which a follow-up survey is sent. The exercise results and participation are tracked in Jira for compliance reporting.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Distribute exercise scenarios, injects, and post-exercise surveys to participants

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Track exercise participation, results, and compliance reporting

config.description: Manually triggered to initiate a tabletop exercise for incident response preparedness training
Select the tabletop exercise scenario from the library based on the requested category

config.additional_instructions: Generate a detailed tabletop exercise scenario brief for the selected category. Include: scenario narrative, timeline of events, inject points with discussion questions, expected roles and responsibilities, and success criteria. Make the scenario realistic and challenging.
config.description: AI-powered scenario brief generation with inject points, discussion topics, and expected outcomes

parameters.initial_message:
TABLETOP EXERCISE — {{code_1.scenario.title}}

Welcome to today's tabletop exercise. This is a simulated scenario for training purposes.

--- SCENARIO BRIEF ---
{{analyze_1.summary}}

--- RULES OF ENGAGEMENT ---
1. Discuss each inject as a team
2. Document decisions and rationale
3. Identify gaps in current procedures
4. No actual systems will be affected

The facilitator will post injects at timed intervals. Please remain in this channel for the duration of the exercise.

config.description: Create a dedicated Slack channel for the tabletop exercise and post the scenario brief
Send exercise invitation and details to all participants via email
Wait for the tabletop exercise to complete before sending the post-exercise survey

notify.message:
EXERCISE COMPLETE — FEEDBACK REQUESTED

Thank you for participating in today's tabletop exercise.

Please complete the post-exercise survey:
{{config.survey_base_url}}/tabletop/{{trigger_1.timestamp}}

Key Questions:
- Were roles and responsibilities clear?
- Were communication channels effective?
- What gaps did you identify in our procedures?
- What would you improve for the next exercise?

Survey deadline: 3 business days

config.description: Post the post-exercise feedback survey link to the exercise channel
Create a Jira ticket to track exercise results, participation, and compliance reporting
Tabletop exercise complete — scenario distributed, exercise conducted, survey sent, results tracked in Jira
